swahili.click_tiles_above_to_build_an_equation: Bofya vigae hapo juu kujenga mlinganyo...
swahili.interactive_algebra_balance_scale_visu: Taswira shirikishi ya mizani ya aljebra
swahili.value_to_apply_to_both_sides: Thamani ya kutumia pande zote mbili
swahili.ask_the_ai_tutor_anything_about_algebr: Uliza mwalimu wa AI chochote kuhusu aljebra!
swahili.linear_quadratic_factoring_system_simp: Mstari, mraba, kutenga vipengele, mfumo, kurahisisha. AI inaonyesha kila hatua + inataja sifa iliyotumika (usambazaji, kuunganisha vipengele vinavyofanana, FOIL). Matatizo ya kawaida ya AP / SAT / Aljebra 1 yote yanapungua hadi mabadiliko ~8.
swahili.multi_difficulty_problem_sets_the_ai_c: Seti za matatizo za ugumu mwingi. AI hukagua jibu lako na kupitia suluhisho kamili ili uone hasa wapi hatua zako zilitofautiana. Hujenga tabia ya kuandika hisabati, si kubahatisha tu.
swahili.pick_variables_operations_target_value: Chagua vigeu + utendaji + thamani lengwa; mfumo huzalisha tatizo la aljebra linalolingana na muundo wako. Linafaa kwa walimu wanaotengeneza karatasi za kazi na wanafunzi wanaochambua kinyume "nini hufanya tatizo kuwa gumu."
swahili.scale_visual_algebra_balance: Mizani — usawa wa aljebra wa kuona
swahili.drag_weights_onto_a_balance_to_model_x: Buruta vipimo kwenye mizani kuiga x + 3 = 7 kwa kuona. Ufahamu wenye manufaa zaidi kwa aljebra ya mapema — milinganyo ni mizani, si nafasi tupu za kujaza. Unachokifanya upande mmoja, kifanye upande mwingine.
swahili.ask_the_tutor_about_any_algebra_concep: Uliza mwalimu kuhusu dhana yoyote ya aljebra au hatua iliyokwama. Mwalimu anajua kiwango chako cha darasa, majaribio ya hivi karibuni, na tatizo amilifu. Bora kwa maswali "kwa nini mbinu yangu haikufanya kazi?"

somali.sorry_something_went_wrong_try_again: Waan ka xumahay, wax baa qaldamay. Mar kale isku day!
somali.your_equation_click_tile_to_remove: Isle'egtaada (guji tiilka si aad u saarto)
somali.click_tiles_above_to_build_an_equation: Guji tiilalka kor ku yaal si aad u dhisto isle'eg...
somali.interactive_algebra_balance_scale_visu: Muujinta is-dhexgalka ah ee miisaanka aljebra
somali.ask_the_ai_tutor_anything_about_algebr: Weydii macallinka AI wax kasta oo ku saabsan aljebra!
somali.linear_quadratic_factoring_system_simp: Toosan, labajibbaaran, factor garaynta, nidaam, fududaynta. AI wuxuu muujiyaa tallaabo kasta + wuxuu magacaabaa sifada la isticmaalay (qaybinta, isku darka ereyada isku midka ah, FOIL). Dhibaatooyinka caadiga ah ee AP / SAT / Aljebra 1 dhammaantood waxay u yaraadaan ~8 isbeddel.
somali.multi_difficulty_problem_sets_the_ai_c: Xirmooyin dhibaato adkaan badan. AI wuxuu hubiyaa jawaabtaada wuxuuna dhex maraa xalka oo dhan si aad si sax ah u aragto meesha tallaabooyinkaagu ka kala duwanaadeen. Wuxuu dhisaa caadada qorista xisaabta, ee aan ahayn malayn kaliya.
somali.pick_variables_operations_target_value: Dooro doorsoomayaal + hawlgallo + qiimaha bartilmaameedka; nidaamku wuxuu abuuraa dhibaato aljebra ah oo u dhiganta naqshadaada. Waxay u faa'iido leedahay macallimiinta sameeya warqadaha shaqada iyo ardayda ka shaqeeya dib-u-falanqaynta "maxay dhibaato adag ka dhigtaa."
somali.scale_visual_algebra_balance: Miisaan — dheelitirka aljebra ee la arki karo
somali.drag_weights_onto_a_balance_to_model_x: Jiid miisaannada miisaanka si aad u tusaale u samayso x + 3 = 7 si muuqaal ah. Garashada ugu faa'iidada badan ee aljebra hore — isle'egyadu waa miisaanno, ma aha meelo banaan oo la buuxiyo. Waxa aad dhinac ka samayso, dhinaca kale ka samee.
somali.ask_the_tutor_about_any_algebra_concep: Weydii macallinka wixii fikrad aljebra ah ama tallaabo istaagtay. Macallinku wuxuu yaqaan heerkaaga fasalka, isku dayadaada dhowaan, iyo dhibaatada firfircoon. Ugu fiican su'aalaha "maxay habkaygu u shaqayn waayay?"
